features: The pampering gift set with its nourishing and soothing content is the ideal and practical gift for all women
A wonderful gift for birthdays, Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, etc. Simply for any occasion
The nourishing products moisturise and clean the skin and leave a smooth and soft feeling on the skin. The summery scent of peach leaves a beautiful scent.

With the nail brush, your fingernails and hands can be thoroughly cleaned and is the perfect addition to the beauty set. The sturdy handle is made of wood, the double-sided bristles have a soft and hard side.
The box contents include 100 ml shower gel, 100 ml bubble bath, 60 ml body lotion and a handy hand brush, all packaged in a gift box.
description: Product Description The beautiful bath gift set Essential Botanics - Fruits nourishes your skin with rich and fragrant products. This attractive gift set includes 100 ml shower gel, 100 ml bubble bath, 60 ml body lotion and a nail brush. The set has a total size of 22.0 x 4.5 x 14.5 cm and is already attractively packaged for direct gifting - it doesn't get any easier. Order online, deliver and give directly as a gift or give yourself a joy. Surprise a loved one, best friend, mum, sister, daughter with this special set - just the perfect little attention for any occasion. Ingredients Shower Gel: Aqua (Water), Cocamidopropyl Betaine, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Dioleate, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Cocamide Methyl MEA, Phenoxyethanol, Citric Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Parfum (Fragrance), Hexyl Cinnamal, Glycerin, Disodium EDTTain. A, Benzoic AC Cid, Sorbic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, CI 19140 (FD&C Yellow No. 5), CI 14700 (FD&C Red No. 4) Bubble Bath/Bubble Bath: Aqua (Water), Cocamidopropyl Betaine, PEG-120 Methyl Glucose Dioleate, Disodium Laureth Sulfosuccinate, Cocamide Methyl MEA, Glycol Distearate, Phenoxyethanol, Citric Acid, Benzyl Alcohol, Parfum (Fragrance), Hexyl Cinnamama. al, Glycerin, Sodium Benzoate, Disodium EDTA, Benzoic Acid, Sorbic Acid, CI 19140 (FD&C Yellow No. 5), CI 14700 (FD&C Red No. 4) Body lotion/body lotion: Aqua (Water), Cetearyl Alcohol, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Glycerin, PEG-100 Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Benzyl Alcohol, Polysorbate 60, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Amyl Cinnamal, Linalale. Ool, Benzyl Benzyl Oate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Sodium Hydroxide, Disodium EDTA, Benzoic Acid, Sorbic Acid Directions Shower or bath: Apply shower gel or bubble bath to a wet sponge or washcloth, lather, and use to cleanse the body. Rinse thoroughly. After showering or bathing: Apply body lotion to damp skin, massaging it in until fully absorbed. Use nail brush to clean fingernails and hands, using both soft and hard bristles as needed. See more
